nasb.text: Thus he did to them, and delivered them from the hands of the sons of Israel, and they did not kill them.

esv.text: So he did this to them and delivered them out of the hand of the people of Israel, and they did not kill them.

cnv.text: 約書亞就這樣處置他們，救了他們脫離以色列人的手，以色列人就沒有殺他們。

ccb.text: 约书亚不让以色列人加害他们，因此他们没有被杀死。
